description:
Create a domain-specific Talon voice control package in 'C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\genomics\' that processes dictated scientific terminology and searches for biological sequences.

The package must consist of 'genomics.py' and 'genomics.talon'. The Python file should define three actions: 'user.parse_nucleotides' to map spoken nucleotide names (adenine, cytosine, guanine, thymine, uracil) to their single-letter codes (A, C, G, T, U) while ignoring other words; 'user.type_sequence' to parse and insert the sequence; and 'user.search_motif' to parse and search for sequences of at least 4 characters within 'C:\workspace\data\reference.fasta'. When searching the FASTA file, ignore header lines and all line breaks. If the motif is found, insert the sequence followed by '[FOUND]'; otherwise, insert it followed by '[MISSING]'. If the motif is too short, display a "Motif too short" notification.

The 'genomics.talon' file must provide the voice commands 'dictate sequence <user.text>' and 'search motif <user.text>' to trigger the corresponding actions.
